text: I really need to know if my order went through. It shows something different on my end but I'm not sure what it means.

I thought my account was all set up correctly and I even checked my details last week, but now I can’t log in. It's weird because there’s this message saying my account doesn’t exist, which is confusing since I just received an email confirming my recent activities. Can someone clarify what’s happening?
The app crashes when I try to upload my latest video. It just freezes and then closes. Any idea why? I checked for updates but it's still an issue.

I've been trying to access my account for a couple of days now, but each time I enter my details, it just tells me that my account isn't recognized. I know my credentials are correct, but this has never happened before. I wish I could figure out what's wrong because it's really frustrating not being able to see my information. Can anyone assist with this?
Could you please clarify if the recent updates to the app will affect my account balance? I’ve also been trying to figure out what the weather will be like tomorrow and if I should bring an umbrella.

I am quite dissatisfied with the service, yet I appreciate the effort you seem to be putting in. It's confusing how I can feel both ways about this issue. I expected a resolution by now, and it hasn't come through.
I would like to request a refund for the recent purchase I made, however, I seem to have mistakenly inputted the wrong billing address on my order. Can you please assist me with this?
I'm really anxious about my order status. I placed it a while ago and just want to know if it's on the way. Is there any update?
I thought I had my account set to auto-renew, but I just got an email saying it won't. What's going on?

I've been trying to use the app for something totally mundane like checking my balance, but for some reason, it keeps crashing every time I open it. It's making it really challenging to manage my account smoothly, especially with my busy schedule. Also, I accidentally tapped on a notification about a promo, and now I'm unsure if that’s causing the issue or if it’s just the app being glitchy. Can you please help me figure this out? I'm not sure if I need to reinstall or what.
I want to get my money back for the last purchase. It didn’t go as planned.

I've been trying to use the app on my phone, but like, every time I try to log in, it just keeps saying that my password is wrong, even though I'm sure it's the right one, you know? I even tried resetting it, but then it says the reset email has been sent, but it never shows up in my inbox. Can you believe that? I don't even know if I've checked the spam folder or not. So frustrating!

So, like, I've been trying to figure out this whole, uh, thing with my account and all the steps just seem a bit, um, confusing? I mean, I received this email about updating my profile but then there's something about security questions? What are those? And do I really need to do this? I thought I was all set, but now I'm not sure because the instructions aren’t, um, super clear. Can someone help me sort this out? Thanks!
I actually received the wrong item, but I thought maybe it was just a mistake on my end. Can I still get a refund for it, though? It's really not what I ordered at all.
So, I was checking my balance, and it says I'm in the negative, but I thought I had money. Can someone explain how that happened?
I requested a refund last week, but my account shows no record of it being processed. Am I missing something?
